description: Both FUSE-T and macFUSE are currently installed. /usr/local/include/fuse3 symlinks to FUSE-T headers. libfuse3.dylib now points to macFUSE. Need to: (1) decide if we support both or only macFUSE going forward, (2) update Nix packaging to depend on macFUSE instead of/in addition to FUSE-T, (3) handle the case where only one is installed, (4) potentially remove FUSE-T dependency entirely. Consider runtime detection: check which libfuse3 is loaded and log it.
title: Clean up FUSE-T / macFUSE coexistence
